2605.03903.title: CC-OCR V2: Benchmarking Large Multimodal Models for Literacy in Real-world Document Processing
2605.03903.paper_summary: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have recently shown strong performance on Optical Character Recognition (OCR) tasks, demonstrating their promising capability in document literacy. However, their effectiveness in real-world applications remains underexplored, as existing benchmarks adopt task scopes misaligned with practical applications and assume homogeneous acquisition conditions. To address this gap, we introduce CC-OCR V2, a comprehensive and challenging OCR benchmark tailored to real-world document processing. CC-OCR V2 focuses on practical enterprise document processing tasks and incorporates hard and corner cases that are critical yet underrepresented in prior benchmarks, covering 5 major OCR-centric tracks: text recognition, document parsing, document grounding, key information extraction, and document question answering, comprising 7,093 high-difficulty samples. Extensive experiments on 14 advanced LMMs reveal that current models fall short of real-world application requirements. Even state-of-the-art LMMs exhibit substantial performance degradation across diverse tasks and scenarios. These findings reveal a significant gap between performance on current benchmarks and effectiveness in real-world applications. We release the full dataset and evaluation toolkit at https://github.com/eioss/CC-OCR-V2.
2605.03903.paper_summary_zh: 大型多模態模型（LMMs）最近在光學字符識別（OCR）任務上顯示出強大的性能，展現了它們在文件素養方面的潛力。<lb/>然而，它們在現實世界應用中的有效性仍然未被充分探索，因為現有基準採用了與實際應用不一致的任務範疇，並假設同質的獲取條件。<lb/>為了解決這一問題，我們推出了 CC-OCR V2，一個全面且具有挑戰性的 OCR 基準，專為現實世界的文件處理量身定制。<lb/>CC-OCR V2 專注於實際企業文件處理任務，並納入了在先前基準中關鍵但代表性不足的困難和邊緣案例，涵蓋了 5 個主要的以 OCR 為中心的軌道：文本識別、文件解析、文件定位、關鍵信息提取和文件問答，共包括 7,093 個高難度樣本。<lb/>對 14 個先進 LMMs 的廣泛實驗顯示，當前模型未能滿足現實世界應用的要求。<lb/>即使是最先進的 LMMs 在各種任務和場景中也顯示出顯著的性能下降。<lb/>這些發現揭示了當前基準的性能與現實世界應用的有效性之間存在著顯著的差距。<lb/>我們在 https://github.com/eioss/CC-OCR-V2 上發布了完整的數據集和評估工具包。
2605.03903.author: Zhipeng Xu et.al.
2605.03903.authors: Zhipeng Xu, Junhao Ji, Zulong Chen, Zhenghao Liu, Qing Liu, Chunyi Peng, Zubao Qin, Ze Xu, Jianqiang Wan, Jun Tang, Zhibo Yang, Shuai Bai, Dayiheng Liu
